nasb.text: The mighty man and the warrior, The judge and the prophet, The diviner and the elder,

esv.text: the mighty man and the soldier, the judge and the prophet, the diviner and the elder,

cnv.text: 除掉勇士和戰士、 審判官和先知、 占卜的和長老、

ccb.text: 英雄、战士、审判官、先知、 占卜者、长老、

csbs.text: 除掉勇士和战士、 审判官和先知、 占卜者和长老、
